summary: Iteration 71 - Complete testing of NeXifyAI system fixes: Scroll problem (height:100vh, overflow:hidden), Connection status (Arcee AI/mem0 real API pings, WhatsApp disconnected, Revolut/Object Storage as 'configured'), Monitoring view with WhatsApp card, Stats API with all counts, Dashboard 8 stat cards, View persistence. ALL BACKEND TESTS PASSED (14/14). ALL UI TESTS PASSED.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified working. Scroll fix confirmed (body/page does NOT scroll, only internal containers). Dashboard has 8 stat cards (Leads 74, Neue Leads 0, Kontakte 26, Angebote 50, Verträge 62, Rechnungen 35, Buchungen 31, Chat-Sessions 3). NeXify AI Chat has 3-column layout with VERBINDUNG section showing Arcee AI=green, mem0 Brain=green, WhatsApp=red, MongoDB=green. WhatsApp view shows 'Getrennt' with red dot. Monitoring view shows WhatsApp='NICHT VERBUNDEN' (red), Revolut='CONFIGURED' (yellow), Object Storage='CONFIGURED' (yellow). View persistence works via localStorage key 'nx_admin_view'.
